V0533_01_00_02_0.text:
You're yearnin' to Duel?
Cool! Let's get it on!

V0533_01_00_01_0.text: When I'm on my game, you don't stand a chance!

V0533_03_00_00_0.text: I still got a lot more in the tank!

V0533_03_00_01_0.text: I know you see your end comin'!

V0533_06_01_02_0.text: You think that'll work against me?

V0533_06_01_03_0.text: I was waiting for you to do that!

V0533_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over my face-down card!

V0533_08_00_00_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Against the Wind!

V0533_08_00_01_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, De-Synchro!

V0533_08_00_02_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Raptor Wing Strike!

V0533_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Black-Winged Strafe!

V0533_08_00_04_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Reload!

V0533_08_00_06_0.text:
Check this Spell out!
Cards for Black Feathers!

V0533_08_00_07_0.text: Here's my Equip Spell, Glow Wing Crossbow!

V0533_08_00_08_0.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Blackwing - Bombardment!

V0533_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Blackwing - Backlash!

V0533_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the effect of my Trap, Blackwing - Boobytrap!

V0533_08_00_11_0.text:
Check out my Trap Card!
Icarus Attack!

V0533_08_00_12_0.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Shadow Impulse!

V0533_08_00_13_0.text:
I reveal my Trap Card!
Defenders Intersect!

V0533_08_00_14_0.text:
This Trap explodes all over ya!
Delta Crow - Anti Reverse!

V0533_08_00_15_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Trap Stun!

V0533_08_00_15_1.text: All other Trap effects are negated this turn!

V0533_08_00_16_0.text: I activate my Trap, Fake Feather!

V0533_08_00_17_0.text: I activate the Trap, Ebon Arrow!

V0533_08_00_18_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Black Thunder!

V0533_08_00_19_0.text: Your best isn't even my least!

V0533_08_00_19_1.text:
I activate my Trap!
Black Sonic!

V0533_08_00_20_0.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Blackback!

V0533_08_00_21_0.text:
I reveal my Trap Card!
Blackboost!

V0533_08_00_22_0.text: I was waiting for this moment!

V0533_08_00_22_1.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Black Return!

V0533_08_00_23_0.text: I won't let your sacrifice go to waste!

V0533_08_00_23_1.text:
I flip over my Trap Card!
Black Wing Revenge!

V0533_08_00_24_0.text:
Like I'll let you do that!
I activate my Trap, Guard Mines!

V0533_08_00_25_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Level Retuner!

V0533_08_00_27_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Black Feather Beacon!

V0533_08_00_28_0.text: I activate the Trap, Dust Tornado!

V0533_08_00_29_0.text:
My Counter Trap activates!
Gravity Collapse!

V0533_08_00_30_0.text:
My Counter Trap activates!
Blackbird Close!

V0533_09_00_00_0.text: Sohaya the Rain Storm's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_01_0.text: Onimaru the Divine Thunder's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_03_0.text: Chidori the Rain Sprinkling's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_04_0.text: Raikiri the Rain Shower's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_05_0.text:
Obsidian Hawk Joe!
Use your effect!

V0533_09_00_05_1.text: Master the birds of prey to awaken a Blackwing!

V0533_09_00_06_0.text: Obsidian Hawk Joe activates his effect!

V0533_09_00_06_1.text: The target switches from Hawk Joe to another Blackwing!

V0533_09_00_07_0.text: Since an effect added Breeze to my hand, I can summon it!

V0533_09_00_08_0.text: It'll tap a Wedge into ya!

V0533_09_00_09_1.text: By removing a Wedge Counter, its ATK and DEF become 0!

V0533_09_00_11_0.text: Jin the Rain Shadow's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_12_0.text: Tornado the Reverse Wind's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_13_1.text: The flock's strength gathers into a singular Blackwing!

V0533_09_00_14_0.text: Aurora the Northern Lights's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_15_0.text: Blizzard the Far North's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_16_0.text: I activate Damascus the Polar Night's effect from my hand!

V0533_09_00_17_0.text: Mistral the Silver Shield's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_17_1.text: For one time only, battle damage becomes 0!

V0533_09_00_19_0.text: I activate Kalut the Moon Shadow's effect from my hand!

V0533_09_00_24_0.text: Pinaki the Waxing Moon's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_26_0.text: I activate Zephyros the Elite's effect from my Graveyard!

V0533_09_00_27_0.text: I banish Boreas the Sharp from my grave to use its effect!

V0533_09_00_28_0.text: Shura the Blue Flame's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_29_0.text: I activate Jetstream the Blue Sky's effect from my hand!

V0533_09_00_30_0.text: Vayu the Emblem of Honor's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_31_0.text: Decay the Ill Wind's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_33_0.text: Fane the Steel Chain's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_34_0.text: I activate Hillen the Tengu-wind's effect from my Graveyard!

V0533_09_00_35_0.text: I activate Oroshi the Squall's effect!

V0533_09_00_36_0.text: From my hand, I activate Etesian of Two Swords's effect!

V0533_09_00_37_0.text: I activate Ghibli the Searing Wind's effect!

V0533_09_00_38_0.text: I banish Calima the Haze to resurrect a Synchro Monster!

V0533_09_00_41_0.text: Gofu the Vague Shadow's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_42_0.text: Gram the Shining Star's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_43_0.text: I'll activate D.D. Crow's effect from my hand!

V0533_09_00_43_1.text: I banish a card from your Graveyard!

V0533_09_00_45_0.text: I activate Blackfeather Darkrage Dragon's effect!

V0533_09_00_47_0.text: Simoon the Poison Wind's effect activates!

V0533_09_00_48_0.text: Auster the South Wind's effect activates!

V0533_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0533_37_00_00_0.text: I'll turn the power of flight into the power of fight!

V0533_13_00_00_0.text: Fly, Assault Blackwing - Sayo the Rain Hider!

V0533_37_00_01_0.text: There’s a storm coming with a deluge of destruction!

V0533_13_00_01_0.text: Soar! Assault Blackwing - Sohaya the Rain Storm!

V0533_37_00_02_0.text: Get ready for a thundering display of power!

V0533_13_00_02_0.text:
Slash on in!
Assault Blackwing - Onimaru the Divine Thunder!

V0533_13_00_03_0.text:
Appear!
Assault Blackwing - Kunai the Drizzle!

V0533_37_00_03_0.text: The thunderclap rains destruction on all before it!

V0533_13_00_04_0.text: Let's go, Assault Blackwing - Chidori the Rain Sprinkling!

V0533_37_00_04_0.text: I’m unleashing a storm of trouble!

V0533_13_00_05_0.text: Go, Assault Blackwing - Raikiri the Rain Shower!

V0533_13_00_06_0.text: I invite Blackwing Tamer - Obsidian Hawk Joe!

V0533_13_00_07_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Breeze the Zephyr!

V0533_37_00_05_0.text: I'm hatching a whole new bird of prey!

V0533_37_00_06_0.text: Swirl your wings into a giant maelstrom!

V0533_13_00_10_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Steam the Cloak!

V0533_13_00_11_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Jin the Rain Shadow!

V0533_13_00_12_0.text: Say hello to Blackwing - Tornado the Reverse Wind!

V0533_13_00_13_0.text: Come out, Blackwing - Gust the Backblast!

V0533_13_00_14_0.text: Here comes Blackwing - Sirocco the Dawn!

V0533_13_00_15_0.text: I Special Summon Blackwing - Aurora the Northern Lights!

V0533_13_00_16_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Blizzard the Far North!

V0533_13_00_17_0.text: Here's Blackwing - Damascus the Polar Night!

V0533_13_00_18_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Mistral the Silver Shield!

V0533_13_00_20_0.text: Let's do this, Blackwing - Kalut the Moon Shadow!

V0533_37_00_07_0.text: The raging tempest combines iron will with light speed!

V0533_13_00_21_0.text: Welcome Blackwing - Silverwind the Ascendant to the game!

V0533_13_00_22_0.text: Let's go, Blackwing - Bora the Spear!

V0533_13_00_23_0.text:
Let's go!
Blackwing - Harmattan the Dust!

V0533_13_00_24_0.text: Here's Blackwing - Kris the Crack of Dawn!

V0533_13_00_25_0.text: Take to the skies, Blackwing - Elphin the Raven!

V0533_13_00_26_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Gale the Whirlwind!

V0533_13_00_27_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Pinaki the Waxing Moon!

V0533_37_00_08_0.text: This heroic bird of prey wields the sword of legends!

V0533_13_00_30_0.text:
Show yourself!
Blackwing - Boreas the Sharp!

V0533_13_00_31_0.text: Bring it on, Blackwing - Shura the Blue Flame!

V0533_13_00_32_0.text: Here's Blackwing - Jetstream the Blue Sky!

V0533_13_00_33_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Vayu the Emblem of Honor!

V0533_13_00_34_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Decay the Ill Wind!

V0533_13_00_35_0.text: Join me, Blackwing - Brisote the Tailwind!

V0533_13_00_36_0.text: Let's go, Blackwing - Fane the Steel Chain!

V0533_13_00_37_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Hillen the Tengu-wind!

V0533_13_00_38_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Kochi the Daybreak!

V0533_13_00_39_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Oroshi the Squall!

V0533_13_00_40_0.text: Join me, Blackwing - Etesian of Two Swords!

V0533_13_00_41_0.text: Take to the field, Blackwing - Ghibli the Searing Wind!

V0533_13_00_42_0.text: Here's Blackwing - Gladius the Midnight Sun!

V0533_13_00_43_0.text: Let's do this, Blackwing - Calima the Haze!

V0533_13_00_44_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Kogarashi the Wanderer!

V0533_13_00_45_0.text: The Tuner Monster, Blackwing - Hurricane the Tornado!

V0533_13_00_46_0.text: I Special Summon Blackwing - Gofu the Vague Shadow!

V0533_37_00_09_0.text: You're not ready for this winged swordsman!

V0533_13_00_49_0.text:
Crow Goblin!
I'm countin' on ya!

V0533_37_00_10_0.text: Prepare for some shock and awe!

V0533_37_00_11_0.text: The dark wind soars from the last days of battle!

V0533_13_00_53_0.text: Here comes Blackwing - Simoon the Poison Wind!

V0533_13_00_54_0.text: Let's go! Blackwing - Auster the South Wind!

V0533_19_00_01_0.text: Strike 'em down, Sohaya the Rain Storm!

V0533_19_00_12_0.text:
Tornado the Reverse Wind!
Blow 'em away!

V0533_19_00_24_0.text: Kris the Crack of Dawn! Attack!

V0533_19_00_27_0.text: My Pinaki the Waxing Moon attacks!

V0533_19_00_33_0.text: Attack, Vayu the Emblem of Honor!

V0533_19_00_36_0.text: Go get 'em, Fane the Steel Chain!

V0533_19_00_41_0.text:
Ghibli the Searing Wind!
Send 'em flying!

V0533_19_00_51_0.text: Fly with fury, Blackfeather Darkrage Dragon!

V0533_28_00_02_0.text:
Sorry, pal.
But I knew all your tricks.

V0533_29_00_02_0.text: I won't fall for these same tricks next time!

V0533_33_00_00_0.text: When I'm on my game, you don't stand a chance!

V0533_36_00_02_0.text: Sorry... But I know you can turn this around!
